query: SELECT project_id, scenario, item_key, funding_source FROM project_cash_flow_settings WHERE item_key IN ('developer_fee_offplan','fraz_fee','rera_registration','rera_units','noc_fee','escrow_fee','community_fee','marketing_offplan','escrow_deposit','contractor_advance') ORDER BY project_id, item_key LIMIT 60;
